creator: mark@seeware.DIALix.oz.au
text:
Attempts to run linux ELF binary (specifically demo version of freedom
desktop - my only reason to upgrade to the 2.2 SNAP and a complete waste
of time) leads to error message saying that libXpm is not an ELF lib, and
a failure of the application to start.

Fix: 

Copied libXpm.so.4.3 from a linux CD and everything works fine.
How-To-Repeat: 
Attempt to run linux ELF binary needing libXpm
